name: Anika Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Anika Therapeutics is a global joint preservation company focused on osteoarthritis (OA) Pain Management and Regenerative Solutions using hyaluronic acid (HA) technology. It sells products such as Monovisc, Orthovisc, Cingal, Integrity, Hyalofast, and Tactoset. The company markets through OEM partnerships (notably J&J MedTech) and a commercial channel including direct sales and distributors.
sellsTo: clinicians, hospitals, and ASCs via hybrid approach (direct sales team and independent distributors in U.S.)
worldwide network of commercial distributors internationally

exposures.sentence: We are a global leader in the OA Pain Management and regenerative solutions space, focusing on early intervention orthopedics.

catalysts.sentence: We submitted our premarket approval ( PMA ) application with the FDA for Hyalofast on October 31, 2025.
We received a letter from the FDA in January 2026 in which the FDA identified a number of deficiencies in which we are preparing our response.

catalysts.event: Monovisc agreement extension by J&J MedTech
catalysts.sentence: On October 16, 2025, J&J MedTech extended the agreement to exclusively market Monovisc in the United States through December 2031.
On March 7, 2025 (the Parcus Closing Date ), we completed the sale of all of the outstanding equity interests of Parcus Medical, LLC...
On October 31, 2024 (the Arthrosurface Closing Date ), we completed the sale of all outstanding equity interests... of Arthrosurface Incorporated...

catalysts.event: Type-C meeting with FDA for Cingal
catalysts.sentence: We had another Type-C meeting with the FDA in February 2025 to discuss finalizing NDA submission requirements, including bioequivalence study requirements.
we are targeting a U.S. launch by 2027, pending approval from the FDA.

tamClaims.claim: Each of Hyalofast and Cingal represents a U.S. addressable market of at least $1 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: each representing an incremental U.S. addressable market of at least $1 billion

tamClaims.claim: Cingal's U.S. addressable market is approximately $1 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We are committed to bringing this revolutionary pain management therapy to the approximate $1 billion U.S. addressable market.

tamClaims.claim: The U.S. tendon augmentation market for Integrity is more than $220 million annually.
tamClaims.sentence: The system competes in a U.S. tendon augmentation market estimated to be more than $220 million annually.
